microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a **2-person operation** into a platformized system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise accounts including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform — defined product requirements, self-service scheduling capabilities, and architectural patterns that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a fully scalable, reusable model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a reusable validation pattern across sovereign-cloud and enterprise deployments.

Built and deployed an **internal AI agent** for drill planning, restructuring workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21% — a cross-customer intelligence tool operationalized directly into the team's ongoing engagements.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a **sovereign-cloud network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, coordinating across security, infrastructure, and partner engineering teams.
microsoft_2023: Championed deployment of **AI-driven code generation** workflows across 14 Azure service teams, conducting user demos and training sessions that drove sustained platform adoption and saved **37 engineering hours monthly** through automated pipeline tooling.

Surfaced critical feature gaps by facilitating 11+ discovery interviews with Azure engineering teams, directly influencing the roadmap to include **intent-based YAML generation** — closing the loop between customer problem discovery and internal platform development.

Improved documentation retrieval by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating content to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool, reducing lookup time by 83% and enabling faster knowledge transfer across distributed engineering teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams — defining the architectural standard for how manual toil was measured and eliminated.

Conducted deployment discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual effort** per region launch, then built a structured roadmap to automate critical paths and package reusable tooling for downstream engineering teams.

Built a **Power BI intelligence dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to prioritize high-impact automation gaps and establish consistent quality benchmarks across the regional deployment platform.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** across a 2,000+ unit pilot by owning the legacy OS migration strategy end-to-end — mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations and defining the technical standards that governed a safe, phased deployment at scale.

Drove cross-functional alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a repeatable integration pattern for future robotics platform rollouts.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies and backlog prioritization to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilizing the developer intake process and ensuring continuous delivery velocity throughout the migration engagement.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflows for 200+ monthly proposals — building a CRM-based process that standardized operations and created a reusable, scalable engagement model.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a data-driven go-to-market strategy, optimizing digital presence and automating lead tracking across acquisition channels.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records**, identifying margin leaks and packaging findings into a structured framework that informed ongoing operational strategy.
